title: Cultivator’s Edge
description: A mod that adds scythe tools to the game
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c7170d96c1e1755126632092144d54d681b4ffc.png)
Cultivator's Edge adds new scythes to the game. They are tools that allow players to harvest crops in bulk in a single swing without taking away the fun of farming. There are various types of scythes, each with their own durability and efficiency. This is a perfect mod for players who want to simplify their farming without degrading the vanilla feel of the game. These scythes will harvest and till you land in 3x3, 5x5 or 7x7 area, depending on what scythe you use. The new enchantment Replanting will allow you to replant the same crops that you harvested, so you don't need to do it by hand again and Harvesters Bounty will award the player with little bit of experiance.
